intro: Welcome to the wonderful world of computers!
A computer is a smart electronic machine that helps us every day.
It makes our work very easy, interesting, and fun to do.
concept.tip: Machines are man-made things that make our everyday work easier and faster!

problems.q: What is a computer?
options: 🖥️ A smart electronic machine
🌳 A natural green forest tree with fruits
🐕 A wild farm animal
problems.a: 🖥️ A smart electronic machine
problems.why: A computer is a man-made electronic machine that helps us do many kinds of work easily.

problems.q: What power does a computer need to start and work?
options: ⚡ Electrical energy or electricity
💧 Clean river water or rainwater from heavy clouds
🔥 Wood campfires and dry leaves
problems.a: ⚡ Electrical energy or electricity
problems.why: Computers run on electricity, which gives them electrical power to start and work.

problems.q: Which of these is a natural thing, NOT a man-made machine?
options: 🌸 Beautiful blooming garden flowers
📱 Smartphone and touchscreen tablet computers
🚗 Motor cars and school buses
problems.a: 🌸 Beautiful blooming garden flowers
problems.why: Flowers, trees, and animals are natural things made by nature, while computers and cars are man-made machines.

problems.q: Why do people use machines like computers and calculators?
options: ⏱️ They make our work easier and much faster
😴 They make us sleep all morning and afternoon in class
🎮 They are only used for playing computer video games
problems.a: ⏱️ They make our work easier and much faster
problems.why: Machines are invented by humans to save time and make difficult tasks much easier to finish.

problems.q: Can a computer help us learn new school lessons and facts?
options: ✔️ Yes, it helps us learn many amazing subjects
❌ No, a computer can never teach us anything at all
🚫 No, computers are only used for sleeping
problems.a: ✔️ Yes, it helps us learn many amazing subjects
problems.why: We can use computers to watch educational videos, read stories, and practice school lessons!

intro: Computer! Computer! Be my friend,
Computer! Computer! Let me write my name,
Computer! Computer! Let me play a game,
Computer! Computer! Let me draw the Sun and have some fun!
concept.tip: Just like our school friends, a computer plays games with us and helps us learn!

problems.q: How can a computer be like a friendly companion to us?
options: 🎨 We can play fun games and draw pictures together
📚 We can read story books and practice typing words
⚽ We can kick it around the school football playground
problems.a: 🎨 We can play fun games and draw pictures together
problems.why: We can have lots of fun on a computer by drawing pictures, listening to songs, and playing games!

problems.q: What does the friendship rhyme say we can draw on a computer screen?
options: ☀️ The bright yellow Sun in the sky
🪨 Heavy gray river boulders and rocks
🗑️ Dirty street wrappers and garbage bins
problems.a: ☀️ The bright yellow Sun in the sky
problems.why: The poem says: 'Computer! Let me draw the Sun, Computer! Let me have some fun.'

problems.q: What can you type on the computer using the keyboard letters?
options: ✍️ Your own name and friendly words
🍕 Hot cheese pizza and garlic bread
🧦 Woolen winter sweaters and gym socks
problems.a: ✍️ Your own name and friendly words
problems.why: The rhyme says: 'Computer! Let me write my name!' We use letter keys to type words and names.

problems.q: When we finish our homework, what fun activity can we do on the computer?
options: 🎮 Play colorful and enjoyable video games
🌧️ Stand outside in freezing cold winter rain showers
⛏️ Dig deep holes in the garden soil
problems.a: 🎮 Play colorful and enjoyable video games
problems.why: Computers have many entertaining games and puzzles that children can play after finishing their studies.

problems.q: Who else can be our good friend besides our classmates?
options: 🖥️ A helpful and friendly smart computer
🐕 A friendly pet dog or cat in our house
💥 Sharp scissors and broken glass bottles
problems.a: 🖥️ A helpful and friendly smart computer
problems.why: A smart computer is called our friend because it helps us learn, draw, and enjoy our time safely.

problems.q: According to the song, when will our friendship with the computer end?
options: ♾️ Our friendship will have no end at all
⏰ It will end tomorrow morning when we arrive at school
❄️ It will end as soon as winter arrives
problems.a: ♾️ Our friendship will have no end at all
problems.why: The joyful rhyme sings: 'Computer! Computer! Our friendship will have no end!'

intro: A computer is called a smart machine because it is very special.
I never get tired. I never make mistakes.
I work very fast and store lots of songs, movies, and pictures!
concept.tip: Unlike humans who get tired and need rest, a smart machine can work continuously without getting weary!

problems.q: Why is a computer known as a 'smart' machine?
options: ⚡ It works very fast and never makes simple mistakes
🧠 It can think on its own like a human brain without electricity
🍔 It eats tasty hamburgers and drinks fruit juice
problems.a: ⚡ It works very fast and never makes simple mistakes
problems.why: A computer is smart because it solves math sums quickly, works accurately without errors, and remembers information.

problems.q: What happens when a computer works for many hours without stopping?
options: 💪 It never gets tired or sleepy like humans do
🔌 It needs to rest and cool down after every single sum
😭 It starts crying and asking for a holiday
problems.a: 💪 It never gets tired or sleepy like humans do
problems.why: Machines do not feel tiredness, fatigue, or sleepiness, so a computer can work continuously.

problems.q: Does a smart computer make calculation mistakes when solving sums?
options: ❌ No, it calculates sums accurately without errors
✔️ Yes, it always forgets the correct calculation numbers
🎲 Yes, it guesses answers randomly every time
problems.a: ❌ No, it calculates sums accurately without errors
problems.why: A computer says: 'I never make mistakes.' It calculates addition and subtraction with complete accuracy.

problems.q: How fast does a computer complete the tasks you give it?
options: 🚀 It works extremely fast in just a few seconds
🐌 It works very slowly like a crawling garden snail
🐢 It takes many years to solve one simple sum
problems.a: 🚀 It works extremely fast in just a few seconds
problems.why: Computers process information at super speed, finishing tasks in the blink of an eye.

problems.q: What kind of wonderful things can a computer store in its memory?
options: 📁 Thousands of pictures, story books, songs, and movies
🍎 Fresh green apples, sweet bananas, and ripe mangoes
🧦 Clean school uniforms, shoes, and woolen socks
problems.a: 📁 Thousands of pictures, story books, songs, and movies
problems.why: A computer has a large memory where it stores digital files like photos, music, videos, and documents.

problems.q: What is the meaning of the word 'machine' in our study lesson?
options: 🛠️ A man-made device that makes human work easy
🌳 A tall forest tree with green leaves and branches
🐕 A friendly domestic farm animal that guards houses
problems.a: 🛠️ A man-made device that makes human work easy
problems.why: In our Word Master vocabulary box, a machine is defined as a man-made thing that helps us do work easily.

intro: A computer is a handy and useful machine for everyone.
We use it to type letters, listen to music, and watch cartoons.
Our family uses it to book tickets, check news, and send emails!
concept.tip: If we make a typing mistake, our computer friend easily erases and corrects it for us!

problems.q: What can you do on a computer when you want to listen to sounds?
options: 🎧 Play melodious music, rhymes, and audio stories
📺 Show animated cartoons and educational video lessons
🧺 Wash dirty school uniforms and cotton socks
problems.a: 🎧 Play melodious music, rhymes, and audio stories
problems.why: We can play audio files on a computer and listen to wonderful music and rhymes using speakers or headphones.

problems.q: How can a computer help you with your school homework and studies?
options: 📚 You can attend online classes and research new facts
✍️ You can practice writing English words and math numbers
🪓 You can cut forest wood and build garden benches
problems.a: 📚 You can attend online classes and research new facts
problems.why: Computers allow children to join online video classes, read educational books, and solve homework questions.

problems.q: What can your parents use a computer for at home or office?
options: 📧 To type letters, send emails, and check bank accounts
📰 To read daily online news and watch video reports
🏃 To run races across the school sports stadium
problems.a: 📧 To type letters, send emails, and check bank accounts
problems.why: Adults use computers to write office reports, communicate via emails, and manage family finances securely.

problems.q: If you make a spelling error while typing on the computer screen, what happens?
options: 🔙 You can easily erase and correct it using the backspace key
😭 The computer screen breaks into pieces permanently
🗑️ You have to throw away the computer and buy a new one
problems.a: 🔙 You can easily erase and correct it using the backspace key
problems.why: Unlike writing with ink on paper, typing mistakes on a computer can be instantly erased and corrected!

problems.q: Can we watch animated cartoons and children's movies on a computer screen?
options: 🍿 Yes, we can watch colorful animated movies and videos
❌ No, computers only display static black and white numbers
🚫 No, video screens are never allowed on computers
problems.a: 🍿 Yes, we can watch colorful animated movies and videos
problems.why: A computer screen displays bright colors and moving pictures, making it great for watching cartoons and movies.

problems.q: Why do people say the computer is a 'handy' helper?
options: ✨ Because it assists us in solving many daily tasks conveniently
🧤 Because it wears woolen winter gloves on its hands
💼 Because it carries a very heavy school bag on its shoulders
problems.a: ✨ Because it assists us in solving many daily tasks conveniently
problems.why: 'Handy' means convenient and useful. A computer is handy because it performs multiple tasks in one place.

intro: Computers are used everywhere around us!
We see them in schools, banks, shops, airports, and hospitals.
There are different types: Desktop, Laptop, Tablet, and Smartphone.
concept.tip: A desktop stays on a desk, while a laptop is light and can be carried in your lap!

problems.q: Where do teachers and students use computers for reading and learning?
options: 🏫 In school classrooms and computer laboratories
📚 In school playgrounds during football matches
🍽️ In school canteens while eating lunch with classmates
problems.a: 🏫 In school classrooms and computer laboratories
problems.why: Schools have computer labs where students learn typing, drawing, and programming with their teachers.

problems.q: Where do officers use computers to keep money savings and accounts safe?
options: 🏦 In banks to manage customer accounts and deposits
🏥 In hospital operating rooms during surgeries
✈️ On airport runways while guiding airplanes
problems.a: 🏦 In banks to manage customer accounts and deposits
problems.why: Bank officers use computers to record money deposits, withdrawals, and customer details securely.

problems.q: Which type of computer is big and heavy, and is kept fixed on a table or desk?
options: 🖥️ Desktop computer that stays on a study table
📱 Tiny touchscreen smartphone that fits inside a shirt pocket
⌚ Smart wrist watch strapped around your hand
problems.a: 🖥️ Desktop computer that stays on a study table
problems.why: A 'Desktop' is designed to sit on top of a desk or table and is not meant to be carried around constantly.

problems.q: Which portable computer is thin and light enough to carry around and place on your lap?
options: 💻 Laptop computer that folds shut like a notebook
🏢 Giant supercomputer filling an entire office room
📺 Heavy television set mounted on a living room wall
problems.a: 💻 Laptop computer that folds shut like a notebook
problems.why: A 'Laptop' is a portable, battery-powered computer that folds open and can rest comfortably on your lap.

problems.q: Why do shopping malls and supermarkets use computers at the billing counter?
options: 🧾 To scan item prices quickly and print receipts
🍳 To cook hot breakfast meals and boil tea for customers
🧹 To clean store floors and wash glass windows daily
problems.a: 🧾 To scan item prices quickly and print receipts
problems.why: Shopkeepers use computers to calculate total billing amounts, print paper receipts, and track store inventory.

problems.q: Is a modern touch-screen smartphone also considered a small type of computer?
options: ✔️ Yes, smartphones are pocket-sized portable computers
❌ No, mobile phones are only used for calling, not computing
🚫 No, touch screens can never be part of a computer
problems.a: ✔️ Yes, smartphones are pocket-sized portable computers
problems.why: As noted in our Wisdom Box, smartphones and tablets are small, powerful computers that run apps and games.

intro: Let us meet the main body parts of our computer friend:
🖥️ Monitor: Looks like a television screen and shows pictures.
⌨️ Keyboard: Has keys with letters and numbers for typing.
🖱️ Mouse: Has buttons and helps us point, click, and draw.
🧠 CPU: The central brain that does all the thinking and calculation!
concept.tip: CPU stands for Central Processing Unit — it is the most important brain of the computer!

problems.q: Which part of the computer looks just like a television screen and displays videos?
options: 🖥️ Monitor screen that shows pictures and words
🖱️ Small computer pointing mouse resting on a mousepad desk
🖨️ Paper printer generating ink documents
problems.a: 🖥️ Monitor screen that shows pictures and words
problems.why: The Monitor is the visual display screen where we see whatever we type, draw, or play on the computer.

problems.q: Which important part is known as the central 'brain' of the computer?
options: 🧠 CPU (Central Processing Unit) cabinet box
⌨️ Typing keyboard with alphabet button keys
🔊 Powerful stereo speakers playing loud background music
problems.a: 🧠 CPU (Central Processing Unit) cabinet box
problems.why: The CPU (Central Processing Unit) controls all functions and performs calculations, making it the brain of the machine.

problems.q: What part do we use to press letter and number keys to write our name on screen?
options: ⌨️ Keyboard with alphabet, number, and spacebar keys
🖱️ Computer mouse with scroll wheel and buttons
🎧 Wireless audio headphones worn comfortably over both ears
problems.a: ⌨️ Keyboard with alphabet, number, and spacebar keys
problems.why: The Keyboard contains keys for letters (A-Z), numbers (0-9), and symbols used for typing text into the computer.

problems.q: Which small computer part fits in our palm and helps us point, click, and select items?
options: 🖱️ Computer mouse that moves cursor pointer on screen
🖨️ Heavy office laser printer loaded with white paper sheets
🖥️ Large desktop monitor screen displaying cartoons
problems.a: 🖱️ Computer mouse that moves cursor pointer on screen
problems.why: The Mouse is a pointing device that moves the arrow cursor on the monitor screen and lets us click on icons.

problems.q: If you want to print your beautiful computer drawing onto a real sheet of paper, what machine do you use?
options: 🖨️ Printer connected to the computer CPU cabinet
🖱️ Mouse clicked rapidly on the desk surface
⌨️ Keyboard spacebar pressed ten times loudly
problems.a: 🖨️ Printer connected to the computer CPU cabinet
problems.why: A Printer takes digital images and text from the computer and prints them out onto physical paper sheets.

problems.q: Which device is connected to the computer so we can listen to songs and audio stories out loud?
options: 🔊 Stereo speakers or audio headphones
🖥️ High-resolution glass monitor display screen panel
⌨️ Typing keyboard alphabet key buttons
problems.a: 🔊 Stereo speakers or audio headphones
problems.why: Speakers output sound from the computer so everyone in the room can hear music, dialogue, and audio effects.

intro: Let us learn the golden rules for using computers safely:
1. Always keep the computer clean and wipe with a dry cloth.
2. Press the keyboard keys gently, never hit them hard.
3. Sit straight in your chair at a safe distance from the screen.
4. Never eat food or drink water near the computer table!
concept.tip: Always ask your teacher or parents for permission and help before turning on the computer!

problems.q: How should you press the alphabet keys on the computer keyboard?
options: ⌨️ Press them gently and softly with your fingers
⚡ Tap them as hard and fast as possible to save time
👆 Press two keys together forcefully with one finger
problems.a: ⌨️ Press them gently and softly with your fingers
problems.why: Keyboard keys are delicate electronic switches. Pressing them gently keeps them working smoothly for a long time.

problems.q: What kind of cloth should Neha use to wipe dust off her computer monitor and CPU?
options: 🧹 A clean, soft, and completely dry cotton cloth
🧽 A wet cloth soaked in water and dish soap
🧻 A rough paper towel that can scratch the screen
problems.a: 🧹 A clean, soft, and completely dry cotton cloth
problems.why: Water and electronic machines do not mix! Always use a dry, soft cloth to clean computers without causing damage.

problems.q: Why should we avoid eating sticky sweets or drinking water right near the computer desk?
options: 🚫 Spilled water or food crumbs can damage electronic parts
⌨️ Because food crumbs make the screen shine too brightly
🐭 Because food smells attract laboratory mice to wires
problems.a: 🚫 Spilled water or food crumbs can damage electronic parts
problems.why: Food crumbs can get stuck between keyboard keys, and spilled liquids can cause dangerous electrical short circuits.

problems.q: What is the correct posture when you sit in front of a computer screen?
options: 🪑 Sit upright with your back straight at a comfortable distance
🪑 Lean forward closely to see tiny words better on screen
🪑 Sit backwards in the chair with your feet on the desk
problems.a: 🪑 Sit upright with your back straight at a comfortable distance
problems.why: Sitting upright protects your spine and back, and keeping a safe distance protects your eyes from strain.

problems.q: Whom should you ask for guidance or help when you want to use the school computer?
options: 👩‍🏫 Your school teacher, lab instructor, or parents
🧒 A younger kindergarten student from another classroom
🚶 A stranger waiting outside the school gate
problems.a: 👩‍🏫 Your school teacher, lab instructor, or parents
problems.why: Teachers and parents guide children on how to switch computers on and off safely and find educational programs.

problems.q: When listening to audio stories or songs on the computer, how should Rishi set the sound volume?
options: 🔊 Keep the volume at a gentle, comfortable, and safe level
📢 Turn volume to maximum blast to deafen everyone around you
🔇 Turn volume completely off so nobody hears anything ever
problems.a: 🔊 Keep the volume at a gentle, comfortable, and safe level
problems.why: Listening at a gentle volume is pleasant for your ears and ensures you do not disturb classmates or family members.
